name: SF FOOD TRUCK Q1 - SF

violations.description: Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. Multiple items being held under 140 degrees. Employee turning up steam table and hot hold unit.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Hand sink not provided with disposable towels.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Service window not provided with screen/pest prevention. Flies present.

source_address: 3705 S Western AVE STE 1, Sioux Falls
